DHANDRISHTI धन-दृष्टि
See the flow — before it runs dry.
Cash-flow foresight & early-warning intelligence for rural micro enterprises — probabilistic 12-week forecasts, calibrated risk flags, and bilingual reason codes a field officer can act on.
NABARD Hackathon · GFF 2026 · Round 1 Working prototype — every number is measured
DhanDrishti · AI-driven cash flow prediction & risk flagging for rural micro enterprises01
The problem

Bharat's micro enterprises are credit-invisible

14%
of India's 6.3 crore MSMEs have
formal credit access · DELOITTE 2025
₹25L Cr+
financing gap — worst in rural
districts: ~32% vs ~20% urban
Detection happens at default.
Kirana stores, dairy units, tailors, agri-input dealers — cash-heavy, seasonal, no audited books. Field officers carry hundreds of accounts with no forward-looking tooling: by the time stress is visible in an EMI, the intervention window has closed.
The invisibility funnel
DhanDrishti · धन-दृष्टि — NABARD Hackathon @ GFF 202602
The opening

The signal exists — nobody has stitched it

DhanDrishti · धन-दृष्टि — NABARD Hackathon @ GFF 202603
The product

One loop, every week: foresee → flag → explain → act

Foresee — conformally calibrated bands: the 80% band actually covers 80%. Decisions ride the stress path, not an average.
Flag — liquidity crunch ahead · EMI stress · buyer concentration · payment irregularity · seasonal dip · negative trend.
Explain — "Revenue is down ~58% vs the same season last year" / "आय पिछले वर्ष से ~58% कम है" — TreeSHAP, templated, auditable.
Act — pre-approve working capital · restructure EMI post-harvest · diversify buyers. One concrete action per flag.
DhanDrishti · धन-दृष्टि — NABARD Hackathon @ GFF 202604
Live prototype — not a mockup

The command deck — running, offline, bilingual

LIVE ALERT TICKER
Every HIGH/WATCH enterprise scrolls past with its top flag — click to drill in.
RISK-RANKED WATCHLIST
200 enterprises · calibrated scores · sparklines · Ctrl+K palette · CSV export.
SCENARIO STUDIO
Inflow shock · EMI moratorium · working-capital line → live ₹0-crossing verdict.
BUILT FOR LOW-NETWORK
Zero CDNs, zero external fonts — the demo runs with the internet switched off.
deep-link for the jury → localhost:8765/#ENT0178
DhanDrishti · धन-दृष्टि — NABARD Hackathon @ GFF 202605
Live prototype — the drill-down

Nine weeks of warning before the balance hits zero

Risk 79/100 — flagged today. The stress path crosses ₹0 in week 9. The officer sees two flags, four plain-language reasons and one concrete action: pre-approve a working-capital line now — in Hindi if she prefers. A missed EMI would have surfaced this ~2 months later.
▲ liquidity crunch · wk 9 EMI 38% of inflows
DhanDrishti · धन-दृष्टि — NABARD Hackathon @ GFF 202606
Under the hood

Boring where it should be, clever where it counts

DhanDrishti · धन-दृष्टि — NABARD Hackathon @ GFF 202607
Measured, not promised

Results on a 200-enterprise panel, temporal holdout

−25%
forecast MAE vs seasonal-naive baseline
80%
P10–P90 coverage after conformal calibration
0.83
early-warning AUC · 13× precision lift
3 wks
median warning lead before distress
Honest posture: synthetic-but-realistic panel — harvest/festival/monsoon seasonality, UPI drift, household draws, ground-truth distress ramps — so accuracy is measurable. Every top-10 alert is a genuine engineered distress case.
Watchlist by segment · 10 HIGH + 4 WATCH of 200
DhanDrishti · धन-दृष्टि — NABARD Hackathon @ GFF 202608
Data strategy

Consent-first and DPI-native by design

🛡 What we never touch
No Aadhaar numbers · no location tracking · no social scraping. DPDP-aligned from day one.
🌱 Cold start, solved
New enterprises inherit segment seasonality priors (a dairy's rhythm ≠ a kirana's) that refine as history accrues.
🏛 Why public institutions can deploy it
No proprietary data moat — open rails + consent. The scoring rail can be a public good for RRBs, DCCBs and SHG federations.
DhanDrishti · धन-दृष्टि — NABARD Hackathon @ GFF 202609
Built for the field

If a BC sakhi can't use it, it doesn't count

📴
Works where the network doesn't
Offline-capable PWA, zero external assets, SMS fallback on the roadmap. The demo runs with Wi-Fi off.
🗣
Speaks the officer's language
Every reason, action, SMS and printed brief in English + हिंदी — extensible to Marathi, Telugu, Bangla.
🖥
Runs on what banks own
CPU-only LightGBM, retrains in minutes, one server per district pilot — on-prem at an RRB, no cloud dependency.
SAMPLE ALERT — GENERATED BY THE SYSTEM, AS THE FIELD OFFICER SEES IT
▲ Liquidity crunch ahead — stress-case balance dips below zero in 9 weeks.  → Pre-approve a short-term working-capital line; schedule a field visit this week.
▲ नकदी संकट की आशंका — तनाव-परिदृश्य में 9 सप्ताह में शेष राशि शून्य से नीचे जा सकती है।  → अभी अल्पकालिक कार्यशील-पूंजी सीमा स्वीकृत करें; इसी सप्ताह क्षेत्र भ्रमण तय करें।
📱 SMS nudge preview — built 🖨 one-page field brief — built 🎛 scenario studio — built ⌨ Ctrl+K palette — built
DhanDrishti · धन-दृष्टि — NABARD Hackathon @ GFF 202610
Impact

One rail, three winners

Lenders — RRBs, DCCBs, MFIs
Weeks of early warning → intervene before slippage; an explainable, auditable basis for cash-flow-based lending; portfolio heatmaps by district & segment.
Rural entrepreneurs
A bankable, consent-based cash-flow record — the on-ramp from moneylenders to formal credit; vernacular nudges to plan for the lean season.
NABARD & policy
District-level early-warning view across the rural portfolio; evidence for scheme design and timing; a reusable public-good rail for the SHG/RRB ecosystem.
DhanDrishti · धन-दृष्टि — NABARD Hackathon @ GFF 202611
Roadmap

From working prototype to district pilot

before it strikes.
